case_title: VALENTINA ROHDE VS. HOMEPEOPLE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROHDE, VALENTINA AS TO DEFENDANT HOMEPEOPLE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION DBA ROMIO.COM JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
